page: Microsoft Azure E32ds_v7 is an Edsv7-family virtual machine configured with 32 vCPUs and 256.0 GB of RAM, yielding an 8.0 GB per core memory-to-vCPU ratio. Powered by an Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor running at 4.2 GHz on the x86_64 architecture, this server features 16 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled. The processor includes a 480 MB L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX) for tile and integer operations.

This virtual machine is equipped with 1890 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage. In benchmark evaluations, the E32ds_v7 demonstrates average performance across several metrics, including a stress-ng single-core score of 2238.28 and a multi-core score of 34203.68. Its memory subsystem delivers a read-only large block bandwidth of 146.04 GB/sec and a write large block bandwidth of 62.52 GB/sec. Notably, single-threaded gzip compression achieves top-tier performance at 36.05 GB/sec, while database operations score an average of 14087.31 on PassMark.

While the server shows strong performance in prompt processing for medium-sized 7B LLM models at 190.8 tokens/sec, it exhibits a performance tradeoff during large-scale execution, dropping to a weak 2.69 tokens/sec for 70B model text generation. Given its high memory density and local storage capacity, the E32ds_v7 is qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-intensive workloads that do not require dedicated GPU acceleration. It is well-suited for relational databases, in-memory caching systems like Redis, data decompression pipelines, and moderate-scale machine learning inference tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure E32ds_v7 is an Edsv7-family virtual machine featuring 32 vCPUs and 256.0 GB of RAM, powered by an Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor operating at 4.2 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture with 16 physical cores, it includes 1890 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage. The server delivers balanced performance, highlighted by top-tier single-threaded gzip compression at 36.05 GB/sec and average multi-core stress-ng performance. While it shows strong prompt processing speeds for 7B LLM models, text generation for 70B models is a notable performance bottleneck. This memory-optimized configuration is designed for memory-intensive workloads, including database operations, Redis caching, and data processing pipelines.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E32ds_v7 is an Edsv7 virtual machine with 32 vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 1890 GB local storage, powered by a 4.2 GHz Intel Xeon processor for memory-intensive database and caching workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E32ds_v7 is a memory-optimized VM with 32 vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 1890 GB local storage, powered by a 4.2 GHz Intel Xeon CPU.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processing, high-capacity local storage, and advanced matrix extension support for enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor with 32 vCPUs and 4.2 GHz clock speed
256.0 GB of RAM providing an 8:1 memory-to-core ratio
1890 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Top-tier single-threaded gzip compression performance at 36.05 GB/sec
Optimized for relational databases, Redis caching, and data pipelines
